P1.description: Build the equity-book dashboard mirroring the silver pattern (YAML→emit→JSON→HTML→Cowork artifact + GH Pages mirror + GH Actions auto-refresh).

P2.description: Live-verify discipline failure — used morning open pull for SILVERBEES (₹262.10 at 10:24 IST) without web-checking intraday or scanning for India-specific tax/duty news. Operator flagged that SILVERBEES had run further intraday on the 5/13 import-duty hike (6% → 15%). Per V-26 doctrine, live-verify always; the price you carried forward from the open pull may already be wrong.

Position snapshot generator reports cluster-only exposure ("Capital Goods 73% of book") which hides the operator's actual thematic exposure (defence + energy-tnd + minerals). Doctrine fix shipped 2026-05-16 (theme field added to STOCK_CARD_TIERS T2/T3 schema + populated on 4 active). Snapshot generator + cluster-cap doctrine consumers need to be updated to render both layers.

regime.headline: REGIME YELLOW (FINAL 260531, down from YELLOW_TRANSITIONING_RED). Binding gates HEALED: USDINR 94.99 (<96 ✅), Brent $92 (oil shock faded, -17% MTD ✅), DXY 98.91 (✅), VIX 15.32 (✅). TNX 4.453% sits AT the 4.45% gate — healing, not clear. The correlated-tightening cascade (§10.1) that drove the RED-transitioning label has dissolved, but the relief rests on an UNSIGNED Iran ceasefire and faces a Fri 5-Jun NFP + RBI MPC double-binary. YELLOW = selective deployment, high-confidence setups only; all §5.1 silver gates + per-position gates still bind.

gates.note: cushion ~3.1; soft sub-99, mild USD-down lean
AT-GATE (+0.3bp over a round threshold); eased from 4.617% (260520). Single most acute regime read — healing but not cleanly through. Fri 5-Jun NFP can re-firm.
cleanly clear; Fri close 94.87, INR +0.99% w/w RBI-supported. Was 96.52 BREACHED on 260520 — fully healed.
still null in raw_inputs — FRED pull owed (P1). Last proxy ~920 bp = OK.

HEALED — Brent -17% MTD to $92.05 (BZ=F close, 2026-05-30) on US-Iran ceasefire / Hormuz easing. Ceasefire UNSIGNED — reversal re-arms the correlated cascade (§10.1 fat tail). NOTE the autonomous regime-update misread this as $108-110 (F260531-F113).

still null in raw_inputs. Autonomous 260531 regime-update web-claimed $681.4B (wk-ended 5/22, ~$1.4B above WATCH) — UNVERIFIED (same run misread Brent); treat as caution / nearest live gate; verify at ~6/5 RBI print. Last prior known $703B.
